response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming experience as a hard minimum, but the candidate has only about six months of professional C++ work (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a bachelor thesis project. Their career has been built primarily on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no demonstrated experience leading internal cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed infrastructure at the scale this role implies. While they show software craftsmanship strengths (TDD, mentoring, workshops), they do not meet the core technical bar.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Demonstrated mentoring and technical communication through workshops, talks, and courses
Some distributed/high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second
concerns: Does not meet the 8-year C++ minimum — only ~6 months of professional C++ experience
No production cloud compute platform or cloud architecture leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform background
